summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Guru Foods NZ Next.js website. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, WhatsApp CTAs, product sections, and image loading. One minor issue identified with mobile menu toggle functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu does not open when hamburger button is clicked on mobile devices
ui_bugs.details: Mobile menu button is visible and clickable, but the mobile menu dropdown does not appear. The mobileMenuOpen state may not be updating properly on button click.

passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct WhatsApp CTA (https://wa.me/64221299323)
Navigation links work and have correct href values (#products, #why-us, #inspiration, #about, #contact)
Sticky WhatsApp button visible and links to correct URL
All 4 products displayed correctly (Fresh Paneer, Creamy Yoghurt, Fresh Cream, Ginger Paste)
Product WhatsApp enquiry CTAs work with pre-filled messages
All images load successfully (hero background, product images)
Navigation scrolling to sections works properly
Mobile responsiveness - buttons and content display correctly on mobile
WhatsApp buttons maintain correct URLs across all screen sizes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile menu toggle functionality - the hamburger button clicks but menu doesn't open. Check mobileMenuOpen state management in Navigation component.
